data.title: Cousins Properties Upsizes Unsecured Revolving Credit Facility to $1.2 Billion
data.description: Cousins Properties (NYSE: CUZ) disclosed they have finalized a new $1.2 billion unsecured credit facility for a duration of five years. This newly acquired credit facility supersedes their previous one, which was set to expire.

data.title: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Grand Canyon Education, Inc. declared that it is set to reveal its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026 and its projections for the entire year on April 30, 2026, following the closing of the market. The company, listed as LOPE on Nasdaq, will conduct a conference call to deliberate on the details.

data.title: SIKORA Unveils Three New Product Innovations for the Wire and Cable Industry
data.description: Downers Grove, Illinois - On April 1, 2026, SIKORA, a subsidiary of MAAG Group and Dover (NYSE: DOV), unveiled three novel solutions aimed at enhancing quality control, boosting production efficiency, and cutting down material usage in the cable and wire production sector. The new offerings comprise...

data.title: abrdn Global Income Fund, Inc. (FCO) Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting Relating to Proposed Reorganization
data.description: On April 1, 2026, abrdn Global Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: FCO) held a Special Meeting of Shareholders in Philadelphia. The meeting was adjourned to gather more proxies in order to meet the necessary quorum. The Fund has established a new date for the continued meeting.

data.title: Q2 Holdings, Inc. to Attend Upcoming Conference During Second Quarter 2026
data.description: Q2 Holdings, Inc., a prominent provider of digital transformation solutions for financial services, is scheduled to participate in JP Morgan’s Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on May 19, 2026. This event falls within the second quarter of 2026. Q2 services a diverse range of clients including banks, credit unions, alternative finance companies, and fintechs in the United States and internationally. Traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol QTWO, Q2 is recognized for its innovative solutions in the financial services sector.

data.title: abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (VFL) Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting Relating to Proposed Reorganization
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Philadelphia, the abrdn National Municipal Income Fund (NYSE: VFL) disclosed that the Special Meeting of Shareholders had been convened and postponed on the same day in order to gather more proxies to meet the necessary quorum. The Fund has decided on a new plan moving forward.

data.title: dynaCERT Announces RSU Award to Incoming Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Toronto today, dynaCERT Inc. (TSX: DYA) (OTCQB: DYFSF) (FRA: DMJ) disclosed the granting of 500,000 Restricted Share Units ("RSU’s") to Kevin Unrath, the newly appointed Chief Executive Officer ("CEO"). These RSU’s were awarded under the Company's RSU Plan and come with a vesting period of three years, serving as an incentive for the incoming CEO. The aim of this award is to align the interests of CEO Unrath and the management team.

data.title: Standard Motor Products Releases 505 New Numbers in First Quarter
data.description: Standard Motor Products, Inc. (SMP) has recently revealed the introduction of over 500 new part numbers in the first quarter of 2026. These additions encompass new applications within SMP's Vehicle Control and Temperature Control divisions, catering to late-model import and domestic vehicles.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 01.04.2026
data.description: Nordea Bank Abp announced on April 1, 2026 that they have completed repurchases of their own shares at 22.30 EET. The company's LEI is 529900ODI3047E2LIV03 and the ISIN for the shares is FI4000297767. The specific details of the repurchased shares were not disclosed in the release.

data.title: Republic Services, Inc. Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) is set to announce its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, after the market closes. The investor conference call is scheduled for 5 p.m. ET on the same day. A live audio webcast of the call will be available for those unable to attend in person.

data.title: ADC Therapeutics Announces New Employee Inducement Grant
data.description: A company based in Lausanne, Switzerland, ADC Therapeutics SA (NYSE: ADCT), known for its work in antibody drug conjugates (ADCs), revealed a recent development. The company granted options to purchase a total of 17,000 shares. This move showcases the company's commitment to its growth and strategic investment in its future.

data.title: CROWN HOLDINGS, INC. APPOINTS JAMES YACKISH PRESIDENT OF ASIA PACIFIC DIVISION
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on April 1, 2026, Crown Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCK) disclosed the selection of James Yackish as the President of its Asia Pacific Division starting May 1, 2026. Yackish will be stationed in Singapore for this role and will be reporting to Dr. John Rost, the Executive Vice President.

data.title: Haemonetics Sets Date for Publishing Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Results: May 7, 2026
data.description: Haemonetics Corporation (NYSE: HAE) has scheduled the release of its fourth quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results for 6:00 am ET on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Following this announcement, the Company will conduct a conference call for investors and analysts to discuss these financial results.

data.title: Verisign to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: VeriSign, Inc. will host its live earnings teleconference for Q1 2026 on April 23, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. (EDT). The company, listed as VRSN on NASDAQ, is a global provider of internet infrastructure services. The earnings news release is set to be distributed to wire services at around 4:05 p.m. (EDT) on the same day and will be accessible on VeriSign's website. It's an opportunity to gain insights into the company's performance in the given quarter.

data.title: AECOM and SMU Announce Strategic Partnership to Invest in the Future of AI in Infrastructure Talent
data.description: A global infrastructure leader, AECOM, has revealed a strategic collaboration with Southern Methodist University (SMU) in Dallas. This partnership aims to enhance research driven by artificial intelligence and promote workforce training in infrastructure engineering. Through this collaboration, both AECOM and SMU will work towards long-term talent development in this field. AECOM, known for its expertise in complex infrastructure solutions, is set to combine its experience with SMU's academic excellence and research capabilities.

data.title: Bentley Systems to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Bentley Systems, Incorporated (Nasdaq: BSY), a leading infrastructure engineering software company, is set to announce its Q1 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, before the market opens. A webcast hosted by senior management to discuss the results will take place at 8:15 a.m. ET on the same day. The press release with results and the webcast link will be accessible on the company’s investor relations website at investors.bentley.com before the webcast. For registration and access to the webcast, visit the provided website.

data.title: Rexford Industrial Provides Disposition and Share Repurchase Update
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Los Angeles, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust specializing in industrial properties in infill Southern California, announced their intent to invest in and manage industrial properties in the region.

data.title: Lightera Announces Leadership Transition as Company Marks First Year of Global Integration
data.description: In Norcross, Georgia, on April 1, 2026, Lightera revealed the appointment of Holly Hulse as the new Chief Executive Officer. Hulse took over the role from Foad Shaikhzadeh, who remains as Chairman. This change signifies a significant shift in Lightera's journey as a company.

data.title: Oxford Lane Capital Corp. Announces Dividend Declaration of 8.25% Series 2031 Term Preferred Stock and Redemption of 2,800,000 shares of 6.25% Series 2027 Term Preferred Stock
data.description: The company has announced a dividend declaration for its 8.25% Series 2031 Term Preferred Stock. This will result in shareholders receiving a dividend payment equal to 8.25% of the stock's face value. This declaration pertains to the 2031 series of term preferred stock specifically, indicating a lucrative dividend rate for investors holding this particular stock. This move is likely aimed at rewarding shareholders and fostering investor confidence in the company.
